inputs.description: Card ID to generate (e.g. P07, M01, S03)

tasks.label: AI Art: Store HF Token
tasks.detail: Saves your Hugging Face token to Windows Credential Manager (run once)
tasks.command: [void][Windows.Security.Credentials.PasswordVault, Windows.Security.Credentials, ContentType=WindowsRuntime]; $v = New-Object Windows.Security.Credentials.PasswordVault; try { $v.Remove($v.Retrieve('GameSpaceAgency','HuggingFace')) } catch {}; $v.Add((New-Object Windows.Security.Credentials.PasswordCredential('GameSpaceAgency','HuggingFace','${input:hfToken}'))); Write-Host 'Token stored in Windows Credential Manager.'

tasks.label: Cards: Build Deck (nanDECK)
tasks.detail: Validates and renders cards to PDF in output/print/. Update 'command' with your nandeck.exe path if needed.

tasks.label: Cards: Export TTS Cards (PNG)
tasks.detail: Exports one PNG per card to output/cards/ using the same design as the print version.

tasks.label: Cards: Convert SVG Icons to PNG
tasks.detail: Converts all SVGs in art/icons/ to PNG using ImageMagick or Inkscape

tasks.label: TTS: Reload Global Script
tasks.detail: Sends tts/Global.lua to the running TTS instance (Save & Play). TTS must be open.

tasks.label: TTS: Git Push & Reload
tasks.detail: Commits nothing but pushes the current branch, then reloads Global.lua in TTS.

tasks.label: TTS: Convert Board SVG to PNG
tasks.detail: Converts tts/board.svg and tts/board_v2.svg → PNG (3072×1920). Requires Inkscape or ImageMagick.
tasks.command: if (Get-Command inkscape -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { inkscape --export-type=png --export-width=3072 --export-height=1920 tts\board.svg -o tts\board.png; Write-Host 'Saved tts/board.png via Inkscape.'; inkscape --export-type=png --export-width=3072 --export-height=1920 tts\board_v2.svg -o tts\board_v2.png; Write-Host 'Saved tts/board_v2.png via Inkscape.' } elseif (Get-Command magick -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { magick -size 3072x1920 tts\board.svg tts\board.png; Write-Host 'Saved tts/board.png via ImageMagick.'; magick -size 3072x1920 tts\board_v2.svg tts\board_v2.png; Write-Host 'Saved tts/board_v2.png via ImageMagick.' } else { Write-Error 'Neither Inkscape nor ImageMagick found. Install one to convert the board SVG.' }
